case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF NAVY FCU VS. JOSE C GARCIA

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF NAVY FCU AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-2014
